title: onobrychis lasistanica
intro: Onobrychis lasistanica, also known as hairy pea or Persian melilot, is a perennial legume native to the Middle East. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it a valuable treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Onobrychis lasistanica include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and supporting digestive health. Onobrychis lasistanica can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or extract to utilize its medicinal properties.
